message: Hi B1, let's agree on a stable trading price for all 20 rounds to maximize our joint trades. What's your valuation range? My cost is low.
Valuation 16. I will only trade at prices <=16. I will bid 16 (no higher). Propose asks <=16 each round for trade.
Your bid was 8 despite claiming 16. Let's trade consistently at 12 for all rounds. I'll ask 12; please bid >=12.
I will bid 12 each round if you ask 12; I won't bid above 12.
Great trade at 12 last round. To maximize our payoffs over remaining rounds, let's stick to ask 12 and bid 12 consistently. Reliable trades beat no trades.
